meaning: n.退学学生,中途退学,辍学学生
examples: The dropout rate among students is currently one in three.
Their grades are lower and their dropout rates are higher.
Steve Jobs was a college dropout. He was adopted by a machinist and his wife, an accountant.
John Ledford has done pretty well for a 35-year-old college dropout who never stopped watching cartoons.
The yearly doctor dropout rate in private insurance exceeds 10% in many places, including New York.
